commands.name: analyze

options.name: --embedded
options.description:
Output in structured format for integration with other
tools

options.name: --type
options.description: Log type: installation, update, rabbitmq, iis

commands.name: parse

options.name: --embedded
options.description:
Output in pipe-delimited format for integration with 
other tools

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Filter by log level: error, warn, info, debug (shows 
only matching entries)

options.name: --type
options.description: Log type: installation, update, rabbitmq, iis

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
Path to the log file (e.g., mylog.log or 
/path/to/logs/server.log)

commands.description: Parse log file and display entries in table format
